data.title: Primaris REIT Announces AGM and Financial Results Release Date, Webcast, and Conference Call
data.description: In Toronto, Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: PMZ.UN) is set to disclose its financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, post-market close on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. Following this, on Thursday, April 30, 2026, the company will conduct its hybrid 2026 Annual General Meeting. Additionally, there will be a conference call and webcast presentation to review the quarterly financial and operational outcomes. The Hybrid Annual General Meeting is scheduled for Thursday, April 30.

data.title: Union of Kansai Governments: Kansai Deep Tech Ecosystem Gains Global Visibility
data.description: In Osaka, Japan, the Union of Kansai Governments has revitalized the Kansai Startup Ecosystem portal to bolster the region's global communication platform for startups and deep tech. Concurrently, the "DeepTech Frontier Kansai" website has been revamped to increase international exposure for Kansai's flourishing deep tech ecosystem. Recent years have seen consistent progress in Kansai's startup ecosystem, with its total value increasing from USD 2.68 billion.
Nikkei index in Japan drops 1.5% to reach 51,089.45.

data.title: Alvotech Files Annual Report with the SEC
data.description: In Reykjavik, Iceland, on March 30, 2026, Alvotech (NASDAQ: ALVO) filed its Annual Report 2025 on Form 20-F with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), which includes portions of the Alvotech Annual Report 2025. This report can be accessed on the SEC's website, www.sec.gov, and on Alvotech's investor relations page at https://investors.alvotech.com/financials.

data.title: Alvotech files Annual Report with the SEC
data.description: Alvotech, a company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol ALVO, based in Reykjavik, Iceland, has submitted its Annual Report for the year 2025 on Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This report includes sections from the Alvotech Annual Report 2025. Interested parties can access the report on the SEC's official website, www.sec.gov, and on Alvotech's investor relations webpage at https://investors.alvotech.com/financials.

data.title: New Christian Book Explores Genesis 3:16b and Offers a Transparent Journey of Faith, Marriage, and Redemption
data.description: In the bustling city of Indianapolis on March 30, 2026, a remarkable tale unfolds in the latest work by military veteran and writer Helen Kent. Through her new book "Genesis," she shares a poignant narrative of personal growth and redemption influenced by the grace of God. This transformative story delves into the deep interplay between faith and introspection, paving the way for self-discovery and restoration. Kent's inspiring journey resonates with readers, drawing attention to the profound impact of spirituality in shaping one's life. This powerful narrative resonates with readers, showcasing the enduring strength of the human spirit in overcoming challenges.

data.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Income Trust, Inc. Announces Pricing of $20 Million of 9.50% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock Offering
data.description: In New York, Cantor Fitzgerald Income Trust, Inc., a Maryland corporation, disclosed the pricing details of its underwritten public offering. The offering consists of 800,000 shares of its 9.50% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock, priced at $25.00 per share. Moreover, the Company has allowed the underwriters a 30-day option to buy an extra 120,000 shares of the Series A Preferred Stock to cater for over-allotments.

data.title: Legato Merger Corp. III Announces Receipt of Audit Opinion with Going Concern Explanation
data.description: Legato Merger Corp. III revealed that its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the period ending November 30, 2025, presented audited financial statements by its independent registered public accounting firm. The report included an audit opinion with an explanatory section concerning the Company’s capability to sustain operations as a going concern. The announcement, in compliance with NYSE American LLC Company Guide Sections 401(h) and 610(b), disclosed the receipt of this audit opinion feature. No modifications were made to the financial statements or the Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year concluding November 30, 2025. The Company's securities are listed on NYSE American under tickers LEGT U, LEGT, and LEGT WS.

data.title: AGI Announces Resignation of Chief Financial Officer
data.description: In Winnipeg, Manitoba, Ag Growth International Inc. (TSX: AFN) has reported that Jim Rudyk is stepping down as Chief Financial Officer ("CFO") on May 8, 2026. Rudyk, who took on the role in September 2020, will cooperate with AGI to facilitate a seamless transition. AGI appreciates Rudyk's efforts during his tenure and wishes him success in his upcoming pursuits. The company will promptly initiate the recruitment process to find a new CFO.
BRENT OIL GAINS 2% AT OPEN TO ABOVE $109 AFTER TANKER STRIKE

data.title: Innovent's Partner Ollin Biosciences Announces Final Data from Randomized Head-to-Head Study of IBI324 Compared to Faricimab (Vabysmo) in Wet Age-Related Macular Degeneration and Diabetic Macular Edema
data.description: OLN324 has shown significantly quicker and more substantial enhancements in anatomic results in patients with diabetic macular edema (DME), along with slightly higher visual improvements that were maintained throughout 20 weeks. This was achieved with fewer follow-up treatments when compared to faricimab. Recent anatomical data indicates that OLN324 effectively achieves faster, greater, and longer-lasting improvements in DME patients.
NIKKEI FUTURES DROP 1.9% IN EARLY TRADE

data.title: Caliber Announces Conversion of $15.9 Million of Preferred Equity into Common Stock
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona on March 30, 2026, Caliber (traded as Nasdaq: CWD), a company specializing in real estate and digital asset management, revealed that an institutional investor has chosen to transform around $15.9 million of perpetual convertible preferred equity into the Company's common stock.

data.title: U.S. District Court Upholds Federal Permit for Rhyolite Ridge Lithium-Boron Project
data.description: Ioneer Ltd (ASX: INR, NASDAQ: IONR) has shared that The U.S. District Court for the District of Nevada has recently ruled in favor of the company in the case of Center for Biological Diversity v. Stone-Manning, supporting the approval of the Rhyolite Ridge mine plan. This project, known as the Rhyolite Ridge Lithium-Boron Project, will focus on mining and processing two essential minerals in Nevada. This initiative is expected to offer a valuable new supply of materials crucial for permanent magnets and batteries.

data.title: Bitcoin's rare trading setup may lead to a relief rally to $71K due to bid-ask imbalance near $66K.
data.description: There is a significant bid-ask imbalance in the Bitcoin market around the $66,000 mark, which could potentially lead to a price increase known as a relief rally up to $71,000.

data.title: Alvotech Publishes 2025 Annual Report
data.description: The Annual Report for the year 2025 of Alvotech, a company trading on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ALVO, has been released in Reykjavik, Iceland on March 30, 2026. The report can be accessed on the investor relations page of Alvotech's website at https://investors.alvotech.com/financials. The report is available in both PDF and iXBRL formats and provides detailed information about the Company's performance and financial results for the year 2025.
